creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Emanuel Haupt <ehaupt@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> This distfile has disappeared again:
> 
> root@portjail:/usr/ports/sysutils/eiciel # distilator .
> 404 [DISTFILE]  http://rofi.roger-ferrer.org/eiciel/download/eiciel-0.9.8.1.tar.bz2
> 200 [WWW]      http://rofi.roger-ferrer.org/eiciel/
> 
> I know the following portlint message is a warning only but I personally think a secondary master site should be mandatory 
> these days.
> 
> WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.

Hmm, probably because of restoration from server trouble, site
contents seems to be rolled back.

If new version won't reappear within several weeks, this PR had
better be discarded since there are no particular difference
between old and new version except GNOME3 support.
